hero.subtitle: JavaScript Developer
hero.description: I build modern, performant and polished web experiences with React, Next.js and TypeScript.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: A selection of my recent work.

technologies.title: Technologies
technologies.subtitle: The tools and languages I use daily.

about.title: About
about.p1: Passionate about web development for several years, I specialize in the JavaScript ecosystem with a focus on React, Next.js and TypeScript.
about.p2: I place great importance on code quality, user experience and design. Every project is an opportunity to create something beautiful, performant and maintainable.
about.p3: Currently a developer at Ekino, I work on complex web applications for major clients, while continuing to explore the latest technologies on my own.
about.quote: "Simple but mastered" — that's my philosophy, in code as in design.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind? Don't hesitate to reach out.
contact.description: I'm available for freelance work or full-time opportunities. Contact me by email or find me on social media.

metadata.title: Maël Aubert — JavaScript Developer
